name: J.R. Claeys
subject: Your rights are under attack in the Kansas Legislature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for Claeys
body:
I'm proud of my consistent A+ rating from the National Rifle Association. And there isn't anything the liberal snowflakes can do that will back me down from the fight for our second amendment rights. No Images? [Click here](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-e-nbbjl-jrliehdm-m/)
# Your rights are under attack

Dear Peter Willis,I'm proud of my consistent **_A+ rating_ from the National Rifle Association**. And there isn't anything the liberal snowflakes can do that will back me down from the fight for our second amendment rights. But I need your help to **stay in the fight** in the Kansas Statehouse. The left has found their guy, and **liberal Soros-funded groups are targeting** the district I serve. In fact, they didn't run a Democrat in any other races in Saline County, so they can focus all of their money and resources on **taking a conservative out**.**I need your help and I need it today.** The limit for [contributions is **$500.00**](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-r/), but any amount, whether its **[$25, $50, $150 or $250](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-y/),** will help get our conservative message out to voters across the district. **Please make your most generous contribution** using our [secure online donation page](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-j/) today! [Contribute Securely Online](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-t/)
## Just this past session we witnessed **unprecedented attacks** on your Second Amendment rights in the Kansas Legislature. Several of those hostile amendments were just a **few votes shy of passing**. _**Repeal of conceal carry rights** in certain public places **passed the House**._
**The bottom line: We need every pro-2A vote we can get in the Kansas House of Representatives. **
## Thank you for your generous support. Every dime will be used to get our message out to voters, educating them on my liberal opponent's hostility toward your rights.
Sincerely,J.R. Claeys
Representative [Contribute Securely Online](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-d/) | [](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-h/)| [](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-k/)| [](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-u/)| [](https://jrclaeys.cmail20.com/t/j-l-nbbjl-jrliehdm-o/)

name: Troy
subject: About tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
Mark your calendars: tomorrow is Election Day! Tomorrow will be the beginning of the end for Jon Tester’s political career in Washington. Montanans have spoken loud and clear that we are tired of politicians like Tester who always promise one thing but then do the exact opposite.
| | | | [ ](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bwjkky-yhdyitiujj-r/)
---
Peter,
Mark your calendars: tomorrow is Election Day!
Tomorrow will be the beginning of the end for Jon Tester’s political career in Washington. Montanans have spoken loud and clear that we are tired of politicians like Tester who always promise one thing but then do the exact opposite.
But the only way we can get him out of the Swamp is by sending me, Troy Downing, to defeat him.
[](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bwjkky-yhdyitiujj-y/)
I’ve been a businessman all my life. I know what it takes to help solve the mess we’re seeing in Washington.
Unlike Jon Tester, I will work _with_ President Trump to enact the America First agenda that Montanans voted for in 2016.
I’ll fight to build the wall and defund sanctuary cities that only serve to encourage and protect criminals and illegal immigrants.
As a combat veteran, I’ll be a voice for our nation’s veterans at a time when they need to be heard -- unlike Jon Tester who shot down Dr. Ronny Jackson’s nomination to lead the VA with nothing but unfounded smears and rumors.
**So make sure you mark your calendars and head out to vote tomorrow! Polls will open at 7AM across Montana and stay open until 8PM!**
Find your polling location [here.](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bwjkky-yhdyitiujj-j/)
Every vote that we can get to the polls is another vote for kicking Jon Tester off his comfy throne in Washington. So, please share our election day graphics and reminders with friends and family on [Facebook](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bwjkky-yhdyitiujj-t/) and [Twitter.](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-bwjkky-yhdyitiujj-i/)
**Make sure Jon Tester hears your voice loud and clear -- vote for conservative businessman and combat veteran, Troy Downing for U.S. Senate tomorrow.**
Called to Serve,
Troy Downing
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Sinema HQ
subject: an update from Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
---
| | Team,

Kyrsten often says that traveling the state and talking to Arizonans is her favorite part of her job. She got plenty of that last week, seeing old friends and meeting many, many new ones across Arizona. Last week in the state was an especially busy one, and it began in a pretty exciting way at the Secretary of State's office:

**WE 'RE OFFICIALLY ON THE BALLOT!** Kyrsten was joined by friends and supporters from across Arizona as she submitted more than 10,000 petition signatures to make the ballot for Senate. Supporters ranged from 11 year-old Girl Scouts to veterans advocates and local business owners.

_Kyrsten is joined by friends and supporters as she officially makes the ballot._
**" WHY I'M STANDING WITH KYRSTEN"** -- Arizonans shared their personal stories of why they are standing with Kyrsten in this campaign for Senate. The **[full Twitter thread is worth checking out](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c2d/45aebd3c/4a52a55e/2ca9e767/2766687604/VEsH/ "https://twitter.com/kyrstensinema/status/1001604483141455872?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+full+Twitter+thread+is+worth+checking+ou&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1")** , but here are two of our favorites:
[](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c2d/45aebd3c/4a52a55e/2ca9e760/2766687604/VEsE/ "http://twitter.com/kyrstensinema/status/1001604483141455872?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1&refcode=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1") **KYRSTEN MET ARIZONA FIREFIGHTERS IN TUCSON** - Kyrsten was in her hometown of Tucson to meet with firefighters from across the state. She thanked these brave men and women for keeping us safe during wildfire season and shared how she worked across party lines to help establish an innovative method to better track and research cancer risks for firefighters.

_Kyrsten meets with firefighters from across Arizona._ **KYRSTEN HIT THE ROAD IN ARIZONA** -- Kyrsten visited communities across the southern part of the state, including Green Valley, Sierra Vista, and Casa Grande.
Kyrsten is building a statewide campaign to win this race for U.S. Senate. Supporters like you are making it possible.

Thanks for all you do,

Team Sinema
[DONATE](http://act.kyrstensinema.com/page/m/595d0c2d/45aebd3c/4a52a55e/2ca9e761/2766687604/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-nl-up?refcode=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1&source=KS_EM_EN_180604_1_1")

She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by [clicking here](http://act.kyrstensinema. name: The White House
subject: Lifting up America’s forgotten communities
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b18013bfdad740914d23586c00742182ee24d4b33e3ba666283c9f2cbf24986698684ac8bbef2a96d4b1934b001298ffbc87f) The White House • June 5, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will participate in a patriotic Celebration of America this afternoon. [Watch live at 3 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b18015180d7548671462d6b84a586a4a0025ea93fe5d487ea72ae0dedd8baa3dcb2d4f71ef67d659127ea8a9031d4f0cf406e) |
---
|

## Lifting up America's forgotten communities
**The economy has created nearly 3 million jobs since** President Trump took office. The unemployment rate has fallen to 3.8 percent, matching its lowest level in nearly 50 years. Consumer confidence and business optimism have skyrocketed. American manufacturing is thriving, with manufacturers expecting record levels of employment growth and investment.
**Crucially, these gains have reached many communities that have struggled historically**. African-American and Hispanic unemployment rates have hit record lows. The unemployment rate for women has fallen to its lowest level since 1953. Jobs have come back to many states that were hit hardest by the Great Recession and America's string of bad trade deals.
**America is open for business, and that's good news for _everyone_**. President Trump's first 500 days included signing historic tax cuts for working families; rolling back unnecessary regulations that hit energy producers, farmers, and manufacturers; and finally getting tough on China for years of unfair trade practices.
[President Trump's first 500 days of growth is lifting all people through a growing economy.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b180156d6507ea2e49ec76dc59a47e4c989f064efc28b2e466f5a82713b474c9405c212701eb9ba8df03ce289494b5ee14dc9)
**More** : [The accomplishments that define the Trump Administration to date](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b18019bcc7e26ce90363e63edbb6cde4747ece2f6b40b89d9521dd7543e636d3e824df473f6f812d9e4dfb9b739ec01e7ded2)

---
|

## Vice President will make third visit to South America
**Vice President Mike Pence announced his third trip to South America** last night at a reception of the Organization of American States. He will travel to Brazil and Ecuador later this month.
**"Sadly the dark cloud of tyranny still hangs heavy** over a few of our neighbors," the Vice President said.
• | "In Cuba, the Castro name has begun to fade, but under a handpicked successor, their legacy endures [with] the oppressive police state they established."
---|---
• | "In Nicaragua, the government of Daniel Ortega, as we all know, is committing and condoning terrible violence."
• | In Venezuela, "the regime of Nicolas Maduro has turned a free and prosperous nation into one of the most poorest and most despotic in our hemisphere."
[Watch Vice President Pence's full speech on Venezuela and South America. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b18012528623b56205ef79037f489af66e15d928141bd8d803d1bc88e4c8877680f2f111b2be2b37feb76644bfe0d661917b2)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump attend a reception honoring Gold Star families** | June 4, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b1801aefd93c7d32b0ee2b048b0f0ac714ff2e83980f6b2fc4316434300da1c9d801b3e30b7024a68023dead9b4ffc9787a80) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b8f7aefcc98b18017d41496e343294c72565fe5d56d70e985f8aab66d3e5592a75760c94c59e0a4ac07d29e550fea3c4aac9ae20a311a823) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d46a8bff0f726181c3296b492178c855d76c7cd150d1d3f0ce8a6c8c379a42c14ba78aa6cbeec6cba19363556e58b4859dae48c5c9f47a0907)
---

name: Team Kasich
subject: Read: Gov. Kasich's Boston Globe Column
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
Appearing in today's Boston Globe, Gov. John Kasich authored a
column about America and our allies needing to wake up to
Russia's efforts to undermine our democracies.

Peter - appearing in today's
Boston Globe, Gov. John Kasich authored a column about America
and our allies needing to wake up to Russia's efforts to
undermine our democracies.

Read the full text below and
please take a moment to share this with your friends, family and
colleagues today!

Thank you for all that you're
doing to help!
-Team Kasich

Boston Globe: Time for Action on
Russia's Conflict with the West
The Russian regime rests on weak
foundations. Russia's population is set to shrink by one-third.
With a GDP close to that of Spain and a standard of living less
than half of our own, Russia relies heavily on energy exports for
close to three-quarters of its export earnings and over half of
its budget. Elites compete, often murderously, to strip these
natural resource assets at the expense of ordinary Russians. They
occasionally arrange rigged elections to retain access to them.
To be able to engage in such theft with impunity, they also rely
on repression. Since transparency that might expose corruption
and asset-stripping is a vital threat, the regime has seized
control of most national media, directly or via proxies. The
regime has also assassinated journalists and political opponents
in order to intimidate into silence those beyond its immediate
control.

Russia's current political system
allows corrupt and incompetent leadership to remain in place
unchallenged. Nonetheless, from time to time, large-scale
tragedies that cannot be covered up take place, resulting in
domestic political uproar. Events of this kind show that the
Russian regime is politically brittle and vulnerable. The regime
is economically vulnerable as well; like other such governments
in the world, it is over-dependent on a single set of export
products. It should come as little surprise that the Kremlin is
aggressively promoting a nationalist, revisionist historical
narrative that glosses over the numerous crimes of the Soviet
system in which many of today's Russian leaders cut their teeth.

Russia has intervened in Georgia,
invaded and annexed Crimea, directed and funded a proxy war in
Eastern Ukraine, intervened in support of the murderous Syrian
regime, launched cyberattacks on the United States, used
sophisticated information operations to interfere in the 2016 US
elections, carried out at least two assassinations on British
soil of regime opponents, undermined the international arms
control regime, destabilized European democracies, and has made
common cause with China to contest the pillars of the post-World
War II international security order. Russia's recklessness and
international aggression have now reached a point where they
require a firm Western response.

It is time that Western
governments acknowledge and react to what the Kremlin and many
Russians have long believed - that Russia and the West are in
fact in a state of conflict. We need to make it clear to Moscow
that neither we nor our allies will tolerate such threatening
behavior any longer. We must make it clear to the Kremlin
leadership that it can expect a series of decisive joint allied
responses if its aggression continues. This means implementing an
escalating series of measures that will isolate Russia until its
behavior or leadership changes: Curb Russian organizations bent
on destabilizing the West; escalate the limitations on Russian
private and public entities' access to Western capital markets;
close off Russian access to the international financial system;
and end Western complicity in the export, laundering and
legalization of assets stripped by corrupt Russian elites.

Toughness is needed from our
side. But pressure can be applied effectively only through clear
channels for negotiation and dialogue. Since the United States
and Russia control over 90 percent of the global stockpile of
nuclear weapons, renewed talks on nuclear arms control are
important. Existing agreements that limit such weapons are set to
expire in two years' time. Nor can the ice age that has descended
over mutual relations be allowed to impede the exchange of vital
counterterror information that can save lives in both Russia and
the West.

Whether we want to or not, we
also have to talk with Russia, a veto-wielding member of the
United Nations Security Council, and work with them, if we can,
on a whole series of regional conflicts: North Korea, Syria,
Iran's nuclear program, peace in the Middle East, Ukraine,
Georgia, Moldova, Nagorno-Karabakh, and the flow of heroin from
South Asia to Europe. For all of these reasons, as in the Cold
War, clear-eyed contacts with Russia need to continue.

Moscow should be under no
illusions, however, that it can use cooperation over these issues
to coerce Western concessions when it comes to defending our
values and the rules-based international order that Russia
currently seeks to overturn. An additional series of escalating
sanctions must be imposed on Russia in order to bring the message
home that business cannot continue in this manner. The time to
acknowledge the renewed state of conflict that exists between
Russia and the West has long passed. The United States and its
allies must rally together in order to mount a decisive and
full-throated defense both of one another and of the
international system and the values embedded in it.

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich for America

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

You were added on July 18, 2015 and you can learn more about how you
were added by clicking here: http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iW0yRyTGNi

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends,
you can click here to do so: http://email.sermodigital.com/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=11057386&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=933663ca3f741b59c37ac8fc9a0afde3&schema=echo3

If you believe you received this message in error or no longer
wish to receive emails from Kasich for America, simply click to
unsubscribe. http://email.sermodigital.com/p/oW0yRyTGNi

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: You > their buddies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e5YWhUqFmTN0W_Ie6fKP4MxcJQLifF1s8gOCs1jotZ0=/YzDcSV97aEoUoCZYTI6HHXsv34aBAOG63hI6Hz3_m24=) Friends and Neighbors -- In America - and here in Florida - we live in a representative democracy. Under our system, each person gets a vote. That vote is supposed to help guide the direction of the country or state, representing the will of the people, to which our elected officials are supposed to answer. But all too often, croynism and pay-to-play politics have re-written those rules - or changed them in the middle of the game. Instead of being beholden to the voters and listening to their voices, far too many politicians seem to answer to their friends and favorable special interest groups - who in turn give them large campaign donations - instead. **This has made too many people lose their faith in government - and their elected officials.** And, unfortunately in Rick Scott's Florida, cronyism and pay-to-play politics is more prevalent than not. The latest case in point, **[a new bombshell report from _Politico_ shows how current CFO Jimmy Patronis was part of a pay-to-play scheme](https://act.myngp.com/el/e5YWhUqFmTN0W_Ie6fKP4MxcJQLifF1s8gOCs1jotZ0=/hjAVwmJItzIpL38RIe2T2432i6AXtWBNtTEEZdKA2us=)**. _Politico_ outlines how now former Office of Financial Regulation Commissioner Drew Breakspear was forced to resign after he "clashed with a host of powerful interests he oversees in the months leading up to Chief Financial Officer Jimmy Patronis calling for his ouster," and that these same interests personally lobbied Patronis to remove the regulator. This is just the latest example of the corrupt business and the pay-to-play atmosphere that Rick Scott, CFO Patronis and the rest of the Florida Cabinet have fostered over the past 7 years. [Help Jeremy Fight Pay-to-Play. Contribute $3](https://act.myngp.com/el/e5YWhUqFmTN0W_Ie6fKP4MxcJQLifF1s8gOCs1jotZ0=/XZotlLVJT8EHs_h78--9Lzp3opPUgq95JZ-rRrUT_I4=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) The cabinet -- and the CFO in particular -- have a responsibility to look out for the best interests of all Floridians, not just their rich friends. As your next CFO, I would serve as an important check and balance on the Governor's mansion, **so that your best interests - and the proper allocation of your hard earned tax payer dollars - are the priority, not the Governor 's buddies.** But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $3 or more today to join me in fighting cronyism and supporting full transparency in the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/e5YWhUqFmTN0W_Ie6fKP4MxcJQLifF1s8gOCs1jotZ0=/XZotlLVJT8EHs_h78--9Lzp3opPUgq95JZ-rRrUT_I4=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: Max Harris
subject: You vs. the makers of assault rifles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/O66iockQrW6dJqXntHwT-K3MHuD4rB8YdYq0qlIrhPw=/XgOeAFW4gdvDJGJua5di8hkciPf4i1z6U-b0yhRweo8=?refcode=em180605” target=)
Friend,
Closing the gun show loophole and strengthening background checks aren’t just bipartisan ideas -- they have nearly unanimous support.
Yet despite senseless gun violence and loud calls for common sense gun reform, this Congress refuses to act.
**[If members of Congress won’t pass basic solutions to prevent gun violence, then take action and replace them with candidates who will. Contribute now to elect Mel and fight for common sense gun reform.](https://act.myngp.com/el/O66iockQrW6dJqXntHwT-K3MHuD4rB8YdYq0qlIrhPw=/XgOeAFW4gdvDJGJua5di8hkciPf4i1z6U-b0yhRweo8=?refcode=em180605” target=)**
But while Mel supports sensible gun laws, our opponent, Jackie Walorski, is a different story.
She has an A rating from the NRA and she’s repeatedly voted against common sense gun reforms -- including background checks for all gun sales.
And it’s no surprise: her biggest sources of campaign contributions are the makers of assault rifles. All together, Jackie has taken tens of thousands of dollars from gun manufacturers during her career.
**The only way for us to compete against Jackie’s corporate special interest contributors is with the help of grassroots supporters like you. Contribute $5 now to take on Jackie’s gun industry backers and replace her with an advocate for common sense gun reform.**

name: OH Senate Update
subject: Get a load of this Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | | | **"McConnell fuels GOP confidence that Renacci can upset Brown"** \-- _The Blaze_ ; 5/30/2018
---
Sherrod's opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci has tried to block patient access to Planned Parenthood. He's voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He supported Trump's tax scam to give millionaires (like himself) and billionaires huge breaks while leaving hardworking families behind.
If Renacci wins, it won't just be our team who's upset. **We 'd say a Renacci win would leave Ohio families pretty upset.** They'll be left with a special interest Senator.
McConnell and his special interest allies will spend millions to take Sherrod down. _We have to help him fend off outside spending and come out ahead in November._

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: Can we chat?
body:
| |
---
Hi Derek,

I wanted to chat with you for a second...

You, a dedicated New Hampshire Republican, have a huge role to play in the upcoming elections. It's going to take every single one of you getting involved and getting out to vote to secure victory!

**Your vote in November is critically important for us to DEFY HISTORY!**

The latest from _[The Hill](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=6pcIN2vzdtSvzUcJ62wErC0Ick6P7J15Cxa59Y1h-2FZfz5qEjLiyyR-2Be-2BvHW3JDvROH4yesk8nVIAg2YgfgbH-2Bszlw0GSXEsDZrbN1sij5ifS38yJ-2FEEUWQ-2Fvb-2BgYuC1qxExynIWg3FkKYD3BiH36rI-2Fjz9ClRHuitB8uqrvLNVo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MqH2qaQviTIjXE9ZsQVNY1rUhVuHSfW9DgJcP2ho3pgi5msiCSZ6WwkjrPj-2BI7utbybyQAU8cJZiCC1bVvpcUIzkfi-2Fc7PBKHpT29nnoIYE9kxYU-2FAdTPsNrRPr6sRB5hThQ44X9h9hGmlR-2F2Om4cCLzH-2FgqfdLK0VL-2FYFBxjbp2YrVqzC0bD9Po5yLdqxcwUfBYgvZa-2FDeQ2LjyDKq5zEZpwK2XBlHp27RYFqxJeMRG0xwAFE1Nk-2B3sTmvLDTc770XvIboO2Rs-2F6PfJnPCDGYw-3D-3D)_ says that Republicans have closed the gap and are now leading a generic ballot nationwide. This means we are bucking the historic trend of a party in power losing seats during their President's first midterm election.

clean_body: | | Hi Derek, I wanted to chat with you for a second... You, a dedicated New Hampshire Republican, have a huge role to play in the upcoming elections. It's going to take every single one of you getting involved and getting out to vote to secure victory! Your vote in November is critically important for us to DEFY HISTORY! The latest from says that Republicans have closed the gap and are now leading a generic ballot nationwide. This means we are bucking the historic trend of a party in power losing seats during their President's first midterm election. I am asking every dedicated New Hampshire Republican on the ground so that we can help defy history and beat back the narrative the liberals and mainstream media are spewing by sending new members of Congress to Washington and keeping the Corner Office! I refuse to lose! Sincerely, Jeanie Forrester NHGOP Chair | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

subject: Got a second, my friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Make sure you're registered to vote.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a637/7ab0e2c4/7f84f970/349bb1a8/1832668019/VEsH/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1") Real quick, my friend -- Today is the deadline to register to vote in Maryland. You know how much is at stake before the primary on June 26th, and this thing will come down to every last vote. [**Take a couple seconds to make sure you're registered or to update your voter registration right now.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a637/7ab0e2c4/7f84f970/349bb1a8/1832668019/VEsE/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/OnlineVoterRegistration/InstructionsStep1") Remember what folks have done to be able to get to the polls -- especially now, we have to make sure our voices are heard. Republicans are watching and hoping we don't show up. We have to prove them wrong. And we will. Thanks, Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a637/7ab0e2c4/7f84f970/349bb1ab/1832668019/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ06058A")

subject: Polls are Open ─ Remember to Vote!

body:
Friends,
After a packed weekend of Get Out The Vote activities ─ door knocking and phone banking all across New Jersey ─ all of us here at Team Hugin wanted to check in with you one last time to remind you that today is the big day─**it’s the Primary Election!**
Visit our website [www.bobhugin.com](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=39349a672f05484da75a6cf757213ebd&_e=q2d4Ypx8SZc19FrEtR2WsrQvkHROo2xPqg7u1X3U87pFCGS9aXau6oBFeieKQJKiS4niAZvvqxCGIp60kbth7UBskYozFOUJ4A0_QKQTEULqdHv0L5c6SVa55Sy-EjLRZ7Q-we5lN2-Ees_zxULSSagfF5FY4JbMbhXD53VxNkN0_-qZkKFvW55epGMiEyNIYQwPMnHDKd_V9aMNcwD3Sw5mo-ZzYjjBc4xJfIIB2IpGp0KwzvCjFjmjZ4ptMO44diS2T5GID7ppgtZYFXScUgdhR6q6b8wSVnOA409CucUgawt0KQK3Oi4Aw16i9gVi3N2p-M_6FJEbjGhlpsBoiRjnNly0KjRiZLpOPri9koQ%3D) to find your polling location or click on the link below:
[Need help finding your polling location? Click here!](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=39349a672f05484da75a6cf757213ebd&_e=wnhhbuz7elfOAAwYQP2HZR3Mhpdh6qK9DBHt4Lrt-evOaYAKYnYnhmxUEqNh4vHlEQjSVostQToATOrrtharvTlfXp_D9JdyyzMJTvsmGdnso30O0gHq6x3KrCuvTfF0R2j_j7mklV4goRuCVdGkQBpSZzEhrH4BEE7S-RDiw3vE2ICLjVeMsljtIdo0B1GTWkTOxxVB24HxyecMdmP5AVHEaZ1zGJ3MRI80ilgdyEpMH9XDmoJObxa4_1KJN-tF538UtCitsvc5p80Bx5qyjaY4IvP0sEgJzxALwOOtfUX-hdNYzXlb7AWVwa2k3oeT7V2MdzmVEjTJj4_DbvyffqC-uz9Pn-q4C6CxOBBkyAZb2IJ6u9KtrKCUo9RXcy67Btda2pXVCm-eEi7K7uuk5w%3D%3D)

This November, **we have a chance to make history in New Jersey** by electing former Marine and job creator Bob Hugin, but we need a strong showing in today's Primary Election to keep our momentum going.

If you have any trouble at the polls, call the Hugin Hotline: (908) 664-0600.
Thank you for your support and for all you have done to help our campaign.

Stacy Schuster
Campaign Manager
Bob Hugin for Senate

Peter --

We cannot thank you enough for all your support to help get us to this point. We're only 1 week away! Corey is barnstorming the state ensuring every voter hears why he's the best candidate fight for you in the U.S. Senate. I would like to personally extend an invitation to **Corey Stewart's Election Night Party on June 12th**. Feel free to bring friends and family. Doors will be open at 6:30 PM but the polls will not close until 7 PM. We will be there all night so come on by anytime! **Stewart Election Night Party
** The Electric Palm Restaurant
12745 Sea Ray Ln
Woodbridge, VA 22192
June 12th - Starts at 6:30 PM

name: Jason Yates
subject: Important VA Election is only a week away!
body:
Peter,
I’m sending you a quick note to remind you of the primary election happening next week in Virginia.
You have the opportunity June 12th to select the candidates who will run in the November mid-term elections. Primary elections are often far more important than general elections because they ensure Christians have a good Godly candidate to vote for.
When elections roll around I can’t help but think about the incredible opportunity we have as Christians to affect the welfare of the city and nation in which we live (Jeremiah 29:7).
How cool would it be if the Christians in your community, in your state, seized the opportunity to select God-fearing leaders who would enact laws and policy that align with scripture – all for a more prosperous society?
Peter, I'll send you one more reminder the day before the election to let you know where to vote; but first I just want to make sure you have a few different resources to help inform your vote.
Take a couple minutes to look up your [sample ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fballotpedia.org%2FSample_Ballot_Lookup&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1806051wb4pe&n=1) so that you can easily locate everything that will be on your ballot.
The [iVoterGuide](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fivoterguide.com%2FDefault.aspx%3Fstate%3DVA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1806051wb4pe&n=2) provides you with information on some of the primary candidates and the [Congressional Scorecard](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fheritageaction.com%2Fscorecard&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1806051wb4pe&n=3) help assess how your current congressional representatives have voted so that you can either re-hire or fire your representatives with your vote!
I’m eager to see Christians take Biblical values into voting booths across Virginia - in just a week!
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1806051wb4pe&n=4)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e1806051wb4pe&n=5).

Birthdays are a HUGE deal in the Trump family.

And ever since our movement began, our family has grown by millions. The support we've received from you and other patriots has been unbelievable.

That's why I want to include you in this year's birthday festivities for my father-in-law, President Donald J. Trump. **

name: Team Morse
subject: before tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hCW6epfcsI5kdjgVCPBBSP_6gsxIBZi-xfDyJdJLcwU=/bf3rmAe_4czoPQ6oYSZ0o7djd4wntcPqs6A8XVkNORw=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180605_TM_eday_all_logo)
Team, IT'S ELECTION DAY!
Today represents the culmination of more than one year of work, rooted in the belief that our district deserves a representative who'll actually fight for our health care, a better education for our kids, and better stewardship for our environment.
Since then, with your support, we've grown by leaps and bounds into the campaign that stands the best chance of beating Tom McClintock in November--and we couldn't be more grateful for everything you've done to bring us this far. All that work has brought us to this day--and it all comes down to tonight.
**If you haven 't already, it's time to go vote--and once you have, be sure to share on social media so everyone knows you cast your ballot for Jessica!**
[Share on Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/hCW6epfcsI5kdjgVCPBBSP_6gsxIBZi-xfDyJdJLcwU=/At9rx6YA2BD-mmyQSOCvVZQtflGSGMS4VUUyOk-YDz8=?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FMorse4America%2Fphotos%2Fa.753765698126462.1073741828.735194356650263%2F956160231220340%2F%3Ftype%3D3%26theater)

name: Election Day HQ [via Bateson4Congress.com]
subject: Today is the day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Today is the day!!
All our efforts have led up to this moment: Election Day.
Regina has all the momentum on her side, but she cannot win unless you show up and vote!
Check out your polling place here: http://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/polling-place/ [http://www.sos.ca.gov/elections/polling-place/]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62063/images/Regina%20Bateson%20for%20Congress%20logo.png]Regina is running for Congress in California’s highly competitive 4th Congressional District.
Help spread the word! Forward this email to 5 friends to help Regina’s grassroots campaign grow.
Regina can’t win this race without support from people like you. Join her people-powered movement by contributing here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-footer?&amount=25.00&recurring=true]
You can also get involved by following Regina on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/bateson2018/] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/bateson2018?lang=en] If you’d like to unsubscribe from our list, click below.
Checks may be made payable to: Bateson for Congress, PO BOX 1130 Roseville, CA, 95678
Paid for by Bateson for Congress

name: Donna Edwards
subject: MAGLEV is not the answer
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2b/767134fb/5f6a46da/43383631/2814754245/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hi , Here is the truth: Prince George's County's infrastructure is suffering. Bridges, overpasses, and roads are in desperate need of repair -- and thousands of Prince Georgians who sit in traffic daily can attest to that. We need innovative, achievable solutions like bus rapid transit, expanded service routes and hours of operation for The Bus, and interconnected outer transit stations around the beltway to address the transportation problems in our county. **After much study and discussions, I believe the MAGLEV proposal, if implemented, gets us further away from real transportation solutions. The costs are staggering, the environmental impacts are immeasurable. And, the overall benefits to the County are few. I want to talk to you about how I would address our infrastructure challenges as Prince George 's County Executive. [Can you watch and share my video message tonight? ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2b/767134fb/5f6a46da/4338364e/2814754245/VEsE/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ZXenlNo7oE&t=345s")** My vision for Prince George's County includes building a new era of opportunity for everyone in our County's economy. We want to send the message to outside businesses looking to relocate, and those hoping to start a business here, that Prince George's County is the place to be. I discuss how I would make that happen as County Executive in my new video. [**I hope you will watch and share with your friends, family, and neighbors. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2b/767134fb/5f6a46da/4338364e/2814754245/VEsF/ "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ZXenlNo7oE&t=345s") Thank you for your support. I look forward to continuing our conversation about my vision to educate our children, expand access to affordable healthcare, provide accountability and transparency, and grow thriving businesses across Prince George's County. Donna Edwards
---
|
---
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2b/767134fb/5f6a46da/4338364f/2814754245/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2b/767134fb/5f6a46da/4338364c/2814754245/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/donnafedwards") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff2b/767134fb/5f6a46da/4338364d/2814754245/VEsA/ "https://www.instagram.com/donnafedwards/")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer

P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: This is a long email, but you should read it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This isn't how the DNC has functioned in the past -- plain and simple. Our strategy used to revolve around presidential cycles, but that's no longer the case.
---
The DNC is doing things differently this year -- plain and simple.

Our strategy used to revolve around presidential cycles, but I can tell you firsthand that our party is now committed to organizing 365 days a year in all 50 states. We can't win if we don't compete, and we can't compete if we don't organize.

Each contribution made will help Democrats mobilize voters across the country. Can you make your first donation of 2018 to elect Democrats nationwide?

**Contribute $3 right now -- to say you are ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states this year.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c61/936640445/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-dnc?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd")

[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c6c/936640445/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-dnc?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c6d/936640445/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-dnc?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c6a/936640445/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd")
** I want to be perfectly clear: Our wins in places like Virginia, Alabama, and western Pennsylvania the past year have been the result of good old-fashioned grassroots organizing. That kind of work doesn't happen overnight, and it certainly doesn't happen without investment.

You may already know that the DNC has launched four programs that will help transform the way our party engages with voters and communities across the country while staying true to our commitment to effective organizing. Before I get into the details, I need to make one thing clear: The only way these programs will work is if tens of millions of Democrats nationwide join together to help them succeed.

**Every ZIP Code Counts** is our party's commitment to organizing and competing everywhere to win elections in 2018, 2019 and beyond. The DNC is investing $10,000 in every state party in the country every month to help with this effort. By working at the local level, we are strengthening our state parties and ensuring they have the resources to win elections.

**Winning with Partners in 2018** is a program launched by Deputy Chair Keith Ellison knowing that the DNC is one organization that is part of a broader movement committed to electing Democrats. Through a series of town hall meetings across the country, we're pulling together state party leaders, community activists, and organizations new and old. By listening to people on the ground, we are discovering common goals and better mobilizing our communities this year and in the years ahead.

**The IWillVote campaign** is an ambitious plan to reach 50 million voters by November. When more people vote, Democrats win! The four components of this program are: 1) getting our community to commit to vote, 2) ensuring they are registered to vote, 3) providing voter education and protection, and 4) running a get-out-the-vote campaign.

**The Best Practices Institute** is an innovation and training hub to support candidates and state parties. We are investing in creative solutions while focusing on the proven best practices that will help develop a permanent infrastructure to continue our progress in 2019, 2020, and beyond.

Right now, Democrats are moving full steam ahead to win back seats in the House -- but that will only happen if we help our candidates across the country mobilize voters, starting today. **You haven't contributed to the Democratic Party yet this year, but with you on our team I know Democrats will be unstoppable. Can I count on you to make your first donation of 2018?**

**[Donate $3 and together we'll build the organizing infrastructure to win in November.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c6b/936640445/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Donate+3+and+together+well+build+the+org&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. I have no doubt that Democrats can win anywhere. All we need to do is organize. **[If you're ready to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, make your first $3 contribution of 2018.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c68/936640445/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+If+youre+ready+to+elect+Democrats+up+and&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd")**

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [update your contact information](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c69/936640445/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c76/936640445/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c77/936640445/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522da5/4067b0a/5bd9027e2/7fb83c74/936640445/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_201800605_abl_nd&source=em_201800605_abl_nd&refcode=em_201800605_abl_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Day 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Friend,

I want to tell you the story of two different campaigns. It will only take a moment, but **[I think it will help explain why I am relying so much on grassroots supporters this year and why that support is needed.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.2i2/n1ruwUxzRwyN1RgP5oGJyg/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgitkJiD2bpt-2FkJPD9ksfPMjeGS7ItR4jq0sshzO6KND7cCpo0gpj8p0APlKETxT8-2FsITpTYaX8VVOEsHR4W9Jva2wxRHO5X1A1FhLMC-2BITxkLyUp-2BY470HcFkDYDNCOsmq-2F-2F0vpwxoIhdOJQV2OCVmdyUEKDcC2Diwd2FK9yQT6Nwoq69YxHu5dE5sJ4Z4KYl6-2FNEf3eypGv0ZPXsc0M4UA-3D-3D)**

At this time in 2012, I was in the middle of my first campaign for the Senate. I’d been crisscrossing New Mexico talking to voters, and it was making a difference. Polls often showed me in the lead, and it was clear my message was resonating with voters.

But then, late in the summer, outside groups started entering the state and making media buys. A lot of media buys. Four prominent conservative groups, including one founded by the Koch brothers, spent nearly three quarters of a million dollars on ads attacking me in the final months of the campaign.

My campaign had prepared for the worst, and we were able to answer some of the attacks with our own ads to refute their lies. But those conservative ads still made a dent in our grassroots campaign’s work and made the election much closer. I consider myself fortunate to have won.

In 2016, Russ Feingold in Wisconsin faced a similar issue. He worked hard to meet with voters. His ideas resonated with Wisconsinites. And the Koch brothers and other conservatives with deep pockets wanted to see him lose. In the end, dark money conservative groups spent more than $7 million attacking Russ. Russ didn’t have the resources to challenge the Kochs’ attacks on his campaign and lost his race, despite leading in every poll.

**That is why I am asking for your support today. Today is primary day, and tomorrow is Day 1 of the general election. I cannot risk being caught unprepared when outside groups start spending against me. We need another 235 contributions in our account by midnight tomorrow. Will you pitch in and help us reach our goal before the deadline?**

**[Your contribution will power my efforts to continue fighting not only for New Mexican values, but for our nation’s.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.2i2/n1ruwUxzRwyN1RgP5oGJyg/h1/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgitkJiD2bpt-2FkJPD9ksfPMjeGS7ItR4jq0sshzO6KND7wMyknahkguHg5-2FXRlzb8IyYX-2FYuz3gErmJ1AccVbyLTDc-2BM3Mfw7MZRB4sHhAxBxy0Ncl-2FTnc2aQ6Y7Oem5QEjNg-2FZvdMiAxz08vzefcAsq-2BW-2FpgsSCG1s2VEiEfFpA3JENVi-2BOU7bLrNcK65WyI-2BGn77VJKW0-2BMnJbR-2FpIRpfw-3D-3D)**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: =?utf-8?Q?electroza2018?=
subject: This election comes down to you: Vote for change, vote Progressive
body:
We've been waiting anxiously for this day to arrive! | | | | [ ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=95bc7c882b&e=3c6155f94b)
---
| | |
---
|
### The polls are open!
I want to take this opportunity to reach out to you about the election today **—** June 5th, a day we have all been anxiously waiting for.

**I am asking for your vote.** I am looking forward to moving on the to November general election with you by my side. This election is a**movement of the people, by the people, and for the people.**

My mother crossed every border on foot, arriving in the "Land of Opportunity" as a Salvadorean political refugee in the 1980s. Three decades later she cast her vote for me as I run for U.S. Congress. I'm part of the American Dream because of her sacrifice. This election is about what we value as Americans. It is because of our collective dream for a better tomorrow, that I am running today.
---
| [ ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=1c1741ed43&e=3c6155f94b)
---
**[The American Dream: Refugee to Candidate ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=50625f3e39&e=3c6155f94b)**
| We have got to elect strong progressives who will promise to fight for us, our values and our platform.

Running to represent our district wasn't an ambitious dream that forced me to move across the country, as my opponents did. This is my home, the place where I grew up. The place where I chose to raise my daughter. It's where you live. It's a place worthy of defending.
* To bring quality jobs to the region, it requires having held a job here.
* To bring equity to our schools, it requires you attending, or your children attending our local schools.
* To appreciate the current lake levels, it requires you living here and seeing Mormon Island exposed at Folsom Lake during the peak of the drought.
* To fight for our environment, it requires a scientific background, knowledge of our forests, and having held a blanket to warm someone who just lost their home in a fire.
* For bold leaders who will stand up for you in Congress against special interests or party lines, it requires an activist, who has been fighting for you well before 2018.

I am the only one to check all those boxes. _**We deserve a representative that understands us, it is time for [#OneOfUs](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=cbcea259ad&e=3c6155f94b), to represent us. **_
---
| [ ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=d5c7af024a&e=3c6155f94b)
---
| [CHECK YOUR POLLING LOCATION ](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=f6715e0e74&e=3c6155f94b "CHECK YOUR POLLING LOCATION ")
---
| We have been campaigning for 13 months. We started knocking on doors in September of 2017 and phone banking in December of 2017. We canvassed in the city and in some of the most rural and remote regions of the district. We've tabled, done visibility at busy intersections, and had too much fun during our door-hanger frenzy! We've traveled to D.C. for the Brand New Congress Summit, and we've covered California attending e-board meetings, conventions, and forums. We have marched, protested, and stood shoulder to shoulder with you as we tried to make sense of what's happening in Washington.
---
| You have been with me every single step of the way. After the polls close come to our [watching party, hosted by Dave Sullivan at the Onyx Club in Roseville from 7:30PM to 11:00PM](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=3232b5f458&e=3c6155f94b), and continue to be part of a people-powered campaign that elects the first woman, first scientist, first person of color, and first activist to represent California’s 4th District!

Thank you,

Roza Calderon

---
| We're almost there, donate $27 today to help us get across the finish line!
---
| | | | [$10 >>>](https://electroza.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=412683cd01&e=3c6155f94b "$10 >>>")
---

clean_body: We've been waiting anxiously for this day to arrive! | | | | | | | | The polls are open! I want to take this opportunity to reach out to you about the election today — June 5th, a day we have all been anxiously waiting for. I am asking for your vote. I am looking forward to moving on the to November general election with you by my side. This election is amovement of the people, by the people, and for the people. My mother crossed every border on foot, arriving in the "Land of Opportunity" as a Salvadorean political refugee in the 1980s. Three decades later she cast her vote for me as I run for U.S. Congress. I'm part of the American Dream because of her sacrifice. This election is about what we value as Americans. It is because of our collective dream for a better tomorrow, that I am running today. | | We have got to elect strong progressives who will promise to fight for us, our values and our platform. Running to represent our district wasn't an ambitious dream that forced me to move across the country, as my opponents did. This is my home, the place where I grew up. The place where I chose to raise my daughter. It's where you live. It's a place worthy of defending. To bring quality jobs to the region, it requires having held a job here. To bring equity to our schools, it requires you attending, or your children attending our local schools. To appreciate the current lake levels, it requires you living here and seeing Mormon Island exposed at Folsom Lake during the peak of the drought. To fight for our environment, it requires a scientific background, knowledge of our forests, and having held a blanket to warm someone who just lost their home in a fire. For bold leaders who will stand up for you in Congress against special interests or party lines, it requires an activist, who has been fighting for you well before 2018. I am the only one to check all those boxes. We deserve a representative that understands us, it is time for , to represent us. | | "CHECK YOUR POLLING LOCATION " | We have been campaigning for 13 months. We started knocking on doors in September of 2017 and phone banking in December of 2017. We canvassed in the city and in some of the most rural and remote regions of the district. We've tabled, done visibility at busy intersections, and had too much fun during our door-hanger frenzy! We've traveled to D.C. for the Brand New Congress Summit, and we've covered California attending e-board meetings, conventions, and forums. We have marched, protested, and stood shoulder to shoulder with you as we tried to make sense of what's happening in Washington. | You have been with me every single step of the way. After the polls close come to our , and continue to be part of a people-powered campaign that elects the first woman, first scientist, first person of color, and first activist to represent California’s 4th District! Thank you, Roza Calderon | We're almost there, donate $27 today to help us get across the finish line! | | | | "$10 >>>" | | "$27 >>>" | | "OTHER >>>" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | www.electroza.org | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2018 Roza Calderon for Congress 2018, All rights reserved.

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: Stop the spread of Lyme disease
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a9/2a380d31/9058b42/f19880/4089045741/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a9/2a380d31/9058b42/f19880/4089045741/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
The start of summer means having to worry about ticks and the Lyme disease they can carry.
Our children, friends, and neighbors are at risk, and Lyme remains notoriously hard to detect, diagnose, and treat. Those infected suffer symptoms like joint pain, fatigue, and even neurological effects -- sometimes over long periods of time.
**If we're going to stop the spread of this debilitating illness, we need to learn more about its causes and how to treat it.[Add your name to tell Congress to put more funding behind Lyme disease research.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a9/2a380d31/9058b42/f19881/4089045741/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_lyme_ja-up%26refcode%3De20180604_lymeja_act%26recurring%3Dauto")**
Every year, there are 300,000 new cases of Lyme disease, and yet we haven't invested the resources to stop its spread.
We need to send a strong message to Congress. Hundreds of thousands of Americans are suffering from a disease that we know little about, and that's unacceptable.
[**Will you be one of the 8,000 names we need to make our voices heard? Sign today to help stop the spread of Lyme disease.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a9/2a380d31/9058b42/f19881/4089045741/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/prevent-lyme-disease/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_lyme_ja-up%26refcode%3De20180604_lymeja_act%26recurring%3Dauto")
-- Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a9/2a380d31/9058b42/f19882/4089045741/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9ndW4tc2FmZXR5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxODA2MDRfTHltZUpBX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_gun-safety?refcode=e20180604_LymeJA_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a9/2a380d31/9058b42/f19883/4089045741/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

clean_body: "" "" Hi there, The start of summer means having to worry about ticks and the Lyme disease they can carry. Our children, friends, and neighbors are at risk, and Lyme remains notoriously hard to detect, diagnose, and treat. Those infected suffer symptoms like joint pain, fatigue, and even neurological effects -- sometimes over long periods of time. If we're going to stop the spread of this debilitating illness, we need to learn more about its causes and how to treat it. "" Every year, there are 300,000 new cases of Lyme disease, and yet we haven't invested the resources to stop its spread. We need to send a strong message to Congress. Hundreds of thousands of Americans are suffering from a disease that we know little about, and that's unacceptable. "" -- Team Maggie ""

name: Trump Watch (via FloridaDems)
subject: IT'S TRUE: Trump wants to self-pardon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
|
---
| Did you see this from yesterday? It's unbelievable!

_Begin original message from Florida Democrats:_
**TRUMP CLAIMS "ABSOLUTE RIGHT" TO PARDON HIMSELF
WE SAY: "NO WAY!"
[JOIN THE CALL: NO SELF-PARDONS ->](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/join-the-call-no-self-pardons-?&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+JOIN+THE+CALL+NO+SELFPARDONS+rarr&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2")
⏰Help us hit 50,000 signers in the next 48 hours⏰** Look, we've known for a long time now that Trump thinks he's above the law, but **no one thought he was capable of claiming an "absolute right" to PARDON HIMSELF!** [](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/join-the-call-no-self-pardons-?&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2") Republicans are happy to bury their heads in the sand because they cannot face the facts: Donald Trump will trample over the rule of law and the constitution in order to keep his grip on power.

[**Trump CANNOT be allowed to pardon himself. The president is NOT above the law. Sign on now if you agree: NO SELF-PARDONS!**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/join-the-call-no-self-pardons-?&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Trump+CANNOT+be+allowed+to+pardon+himsel&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2") [NO SELF-PARDONS ](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/join-the-call-no-self-pardons-?&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+NO+SELFPARDONS+&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2") We fought this battle over 240 years ago when we gained our independence: no one -- no matter who they are (including our leaders) -- is above the law.

The Founding Fathers created the Constitution to ensure government was always held accountable to the people.

_Now, Trump is saying he will undo the rule of law in order to save himself. This goes against everything our country is founded on!_

[**Trump cannot be allowed to act like he 's above the law. He is not a king. Sign on right now to join the call: NO SELF-PARDONS.**](http://act.floridadems. "https://act.floridadems.org/page/s/join-the-call-no-self-pardons-?&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=5+-+Trump+cannot+be+allowed+to+act+like+hers&utm_campaign=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&source=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2&refcode=FDP_EM_PT_180DO_180605_1_2")

Thank you,

Florida Democrats

name: JoeforIndiana.com
subject: T-shirts are BACK!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Summer is almost here, and we're kicking this campaign into high gear. What better way to show your support than with a Joe for Indiana t-shirt? |
---

| | Peter,

Summer is almost here, and we're kicking this campaign into high gear -- for Joe, that means _a lot_ of marching in parades. With Independence Day just around the corner, there are plenty of great opportunities to get out there and show your support for Joe!

[**And what better way to do so than with an official Joe for Indiana t-shirt? We 're bringing them back for the summer -- get yours for just $25!**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21d8/7377f838/3c2f3541/51f907d5/3942370464/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdtshirt?refcode=20180605.1") | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21d8/7377f838/3c2f3541/51f907d5/3942370464/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdtshirt?refcode=20180605.1")
---
We won't lie, we've got a tough race ahead of us. But the long hours and late nights are more than worth it to make sure Hoosiers continue to have a champion in the Senate fighting for access to affordable health care, a tax code that works for everyone, and to end the influence of unaccountable dark money in politics.

**We 're proud to be on Team Donnelly, and we're proud to have you on our side -- [show you're with us and order a t-shirt today!](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21d8/7377f838/3c2f3541/51f907d5/3942370464/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdtshirt?refcode=20180605.1")**

See you out there,
Team Donnelly

Team, we're loving the enthusiasm we're seeing as folks cast their vote for Jessica!
You all are posting photos, tweeting to let everyone know you voted, and showing once and for all how much this district believes in our campaign and in Jessica's commitment to our communities.
If you haven't voted yet, [_**look up your polling place now.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/OzHHJ-7X7rr1FhxcqxdAcpLCOq4nTDNBi64X5TNKBtI=/Dwuf_grb2Twa6TtM2yrp8VPB6SsVZeeHUnqqt0HU9A8=) We need every vote in the bank tonight--our performance tonight will send a strong message about our potential in the general.
Thanks for everything,
Makaiah

Deputy Campaign Manager
Morse for Congress

name: Team Caforio
subject: Election Day is here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS
body:

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: The beating heart of Trump's corruption is right here in New York.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I will never take my eye off the threat in the White House.
#
**We launched our campaign with a speech in front of Trump Tower and made clear that we will take on the corruption and lawlessness of our country 's most powerful people. Chip in $3 now to make sure we're ready to fight back.**
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e2d/6e822e2f/1899e061/4172114c/1350666736/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDUtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180605-full")
Peter -
Earlier today, I stood in front of Trump Tower and formally launched our campaign for Attorney General.
I wanted to send a clear signal about our priorities and where we stand.
We have never seen a threat to our state or our country like the man who owns that tower. He embodies everything that is threatening to destroy our democracy -- rampant corruption, sexual harassment, bigotry, corporate cronyism, abuses of power, lawlessness.
Today we made absolutely clear that we stand against all of that. We believe it is the Attorney General's duty to be a check on his power. No one is above the law -- no matter what he tweets.
I'll be blunt: The New York Attorney General has far more power than has been used to protect us from Trump. Our next AG can and must use these powers to the full extent.
**When I am AG, we will lead the fight to stop Trump 's corruption and set an example for the nation.**
With this announcement, we've drawn a line in the sand. Trump and his wealthy allies have no doubt as to where we stand. That's why they likely don't want to see me anywhere near this office. I need your support to make sure we win.
**[Peter, can you make a $3 donation today? With our official launch, we need to show people that we are in this together. Your contribution sends a message to those that want to stop us that we will not back down. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e2d/6e822e2f/1899e061/4172114c/1350666736/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDUtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180605-full")**
The beating heart of Trump's corruption is right here in New York. It is through the Trump Organization, headquartered here, that he has turned the presidency into his personal ATM -- engaging in highly suspect business deals aimed at funneling money from foreign governments into his own pockets. He has turned our democracy into a kleptocracy.
That is unacceptable.
In fact, it violates the emoluments clause of the Constitution. Every time he uses his businesses to take money from foreign governments, Donald Trump is breaking the law.
Immediately after he took office, I helped sue him for this. I worked with our country's top constitutional lawyers to build the legal team and the strategy behind the suit.
This lawsuit, the first of its kind, has the power to do what other Trump litigation cannot do: get a court order declaring that Trump must divest his business interests.
New York should have been the lead on a parallel suit but did not bring a case. That would not happen again under Attorney General Teachout. I will never take my eye off the threat in the White House.
I want to be clear that this isn't just about Trump either. He represents one of the greatest threats, but we will have the same approach for those that break the law in Albany, on Wall Street or in real estate.
The sword of law is our best answer to the threat of tyranny and unchecked, arbitrary power.
I promise as your Attorney General to wield that awesome power in the name of the people, the law, and justice. That is how we will take down the corrupt elites who have a stranglehold on our democracy and economy.
**[Your $3 donation is so important to making this possible. It's how we will win this campaign, and when we win, we will transform how the system works. We will make clear that no one is above the law-- including the president.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e2d/6e822e2f/1899e061/4172114c/1350666736/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDUtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180605-full")**
We know that our country is in desperate need of change, so much of our system is broken. But we cannot wish this change into existence, it's going to require a change in leadership.
That's what we will do in this campaign, and it's why we need you with us. Together we can charge forth and win.
Best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e2d/6e822e2f/1899e061/4172114c/1350666736/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDUtZnVsbCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180605-full")

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY

Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e2d/6e822e2f/1899e061/4172114d/1350666736/VEsD/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e2d/6e822e2f/1899e061/4172114e/1350666736/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Mary Ellen Smith, bobcasey.com
subject: Meet Congressman Lou Barletta (he's one of Trump's favorite Senate candidates)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Hi there,

We're now one month in with Lou Barletta as the Republicans' choice to challenge Bob Casey for Pennsylvania's Senate seat. If you don't know him, he's a former mayor who received praise from white supremacists for his anti-immigrant policies and a current Congressman who votes with the president 99% of the time, even when it goes against Pennsylvania's interests.

Barletta in this race has two major implications for Pennsylvania in 2018:
1. The president is going to be actively involved in this race. He's recorded a robocall for Congressman Barletta, calling him a "good friend" and "a very special guy" and says that in Congress, "he's helped me all the way down the line." After Barletta's win last month, he tweeted attacks against Bob. They're buddies, and we'll probably see the president hitting the campaign trail in Pennsylvania soon.

2. National Republicans are going to keep pouring their time and money into Pennsylvania, trying to flip this seat. Just last week _WHYY_ said that our race "is expected to be one of the most expensive in the nation this year. And it will be pivotal in deciding control of the Senate." Every Democrat who wants to take back the Senate has to pay attention to the fact that the president's time and Republican resources are already being used to boost Barletta with about five months left until Election Day.

This isn't exactly surprising. Ever since Bob voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have stepped up their attacks against him. Here at campaign HQ, we're preparing for an onslaught of lies and smears from the president's powerful friends.

This campaign is heating up, and some extra money in the budget would help Bob get his message out to more voters early in this head-to-head race. Another $7,800 would go a long way -- can you chip in $5 to help me meet that goal?

Here's the best link: [**_secure.bobcasey.com/donate_**](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6683/51dbcc2a/7ac165b/3a2ddc2/539493056/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNV9GUl9uZF9WM1MxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180605_FR_nd_V3S1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Thanks,

Mary Ellen

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6683/51dbcc2a/7ac165b/3a2ddc3/539493056/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: 48 women on the ballot in 5 states. Here's what you need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c45b6/24c69fd9/1acb7d964/18818cd6/3340265282/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER09N_digital_email_20180605_SuperTuesWatching_inact&source=WQEFER09N_digital_email_20180605_SuperTuesWatching_inact")
---

Peter,

It's finally here: Super Tuesday 2018. Our biggest primary night of the year!

We're thrilled to have endorsed 48 pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot in five states -- including special elections in Missouri and California.

Here's what we're looking out for as results come in tonight:
* **House:** Of the 12 House races we're watching tonight, nine are red-to-blue seats. And five of our candidates are running in California districts that Hillary Clinton won in 2016 but are currently represented by Republicans.

* **Governor:** Watch out for New Mexico's Michelle Lujan Grisham, running to become the first Democratic Latina governor ever.

* **State & Local:** We have 34 women further down the ballot: 26 state legislative races, two secretaries of state, two district attorneys, one lieutenant governor, one state treasurer, one state controller, and one land commissioner. Whew! Twelve of the 26 are red-to-blue opportunities.

I'm so excited to cheer on our candidates as votes are counted. Victories tonight will set the stage for our chances to take back Congress and state legislatures in November.

Let's show all of our women -- those on the ballot today and all those we've endorsed so far this cycle -- that we have their backs.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win their elections:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Watch-Super-Tuesday](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c45b6/24c69fd9/1acb7d964/18818cd7/3340265282/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180605_email_SuperTuesdayWatching?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWatchSuperTuesda&utm_campaign=WQEFER09N_digital_email_20180605_SuperTuesWatching_inact&source=WQEFER09N_digital_email_20180605_SuperTuesWatching_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c45b6/24c69fd9/1acb7d964/18818cd0/3340265282/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180605_email_SuperTuesdayWatching?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFER09N_digital_email_20180605_SuperTuesWatching_inact&source=WQEFER09N_digital_email_20180605_SuperTuesWatching_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

name: Jeff Carson, AustinPetersen.com
subject: New AP endorsement!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hey Friend, I am super excited to announce our very first endorsement from a Missouri State Representative, Dr. Jim Neely! This is a big deal, Friend. Check out what Rep. Neely said about our campaign: [](https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060518_endorse&n=1) Here is his full quote: _“Austin Petersen is certainly not ‘mailing it in’ - he is everywhere. I’ve lost count of how many events we’ve been to together. I have yet to meet any of the other leading candidates at any of the Lincoln Day events or elsewhere._ _His grassroots support is growing. Missouri needs an honest, principled, hard-working representative in Washington, D.C. I believe Austin is that leader and enthusiastically endorse him in the upcoming GOP primary.” - Rep. Jim Neely, District 8_ Rep. Neely is right. Austin is campaigning all across the state, talking with voters, attending events, and answering tough questions. All this while none of the other candidates are to be found anywhere. [**Friend, have you endorsed Austin’s campaign for U.S. Senate yet? Please click here to add your name to our list of endorsements >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060518_endorse&n=2) Building an impressive grassroots army is a KEY part of our campaign strategy. Collecting endorsements helps us build the narrative that Austin is the grassroots candidate. So please add your name! I’ll let Austin know he has your endorsement once you’ve filled it out :) Here is the link again: [**https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/endorse?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060518_endorse&n=3) Thanks, Friend.
