name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Real quick: can you help these progressive candidates?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
If you were in Ames, Iowa this weekend getting out the vote for today's primary, you would have no doubt about the political revolution powering the progressive movement across this country.
#
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aadf/bed43eb/6b8a87da/75fde843/433209462/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180605-full&noskip=true")
_Our Revolution President Nina Turner speaks to Story County Democrats and Our Revolution members in Story County, Iowa._
Friends,
If you were in Ames, Iowa this weekend getting out the vote for today's primary, you would have no doubt about the political revolution powering the progressive movement across this country.
In the home of the first-in-the-nation caucus, where politics has long been regarded as a way of life, I continue to be astounded by the energy of new voters who have been drawn by a progressive message to participate in events for the very first time. They have been energized by Senator Bernie Sanders' message of political revolution, and people like you who are willing to stand up and join them.
It's not just in Iowa. In California, New Mexico, New Jersey, Alabama, and Montana, we have legislative candidates who support a $15 minimum wage, district attorney and sheriff candidates who will work to undo the institutionalized racism of our criminal justice system, and executive branch candidates with the ability to enact reforms across entire states. Local groups on the ground are working hard to get out the vote, and volunteers across the country are calling, texting, and doing everything they can to swing these races for our candidates.
[**Please chip in $5 to build this movement with us.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aadf/bed43eb/6b8a87da/75fde843/433209462/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180605-full&noskip=true")
We wish all of our candidates the best of luck. We look forward to the many victories to come.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aadf/bed43eb/6b8a87da/75fde843/433209462/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/new-leaders?refcode=em180605-full&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035

Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aadf/bed43eb/6b8a87da/75fde84f/433209462/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Staff via Martin Heinrich
subject: FWD -- Day 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | We know we email a lot, team, but Martin’s story below helps explain why. Tomorrow is Day 1 of the general election, and **[we’d appreciate your support so Martin can have what it takes to answer the conservative attacks coming his way.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.2i2/WfDPvTDQTQy735HhnPjibA/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cguUiYJt6jTLP5sZSWOrB2TvV9TTAz7zkAvtihgRFEZa-2FLy174p3a7De0wQO-2FNcCHLuweFvBYgmoUyTWI-2F-2B3y3v9CldFOvZsRV5EOrp-2BtYeTPw9HoxmoCpCMKFjkdN8zESqn1RB1l1V0LB6bSfMChW1S1L895dcqnjTaz3EL8m8Rw3O6T9RVZsBR-2F-2F64yIsLXKpiFDkhhIAsDaKBfXX5eEEA-3D-3D)**

_Begin original message from Martin Heinrich:_

Friend,

I want to tell you the story of two different campaigns. It will only take a moment, but **[I think it will help explain why I am relying so much on grassroots supporters this year and why that support is needed.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.2i2/WfDPvTDQTQy735HhnPjibA/h1/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cguUiYJt6jTLP5sZSWOrB2TvV9TTAz7zkAvtihgRFEZa-2FEL7DwoSA-2Bt89U6zKSqQ7uHY5t8Z8LhpXu3Whh8ZaoKEVAMrpz-2FfTPGlN1gbb-2BfWg19CX4PuK2eKMFf65b47X4p2Rb8IgT6Jf8GCOxo1irLKoQfzbG5o6XXaK-2FlIFKw7g94m2IrDGRjxWPjJkDoCnjUH7wMBU-2BdA2jlImUyzAP0Q-3D-3D)**

At this time in 2012, I was in the middle of my first campaign for the Senate. I’d been crisscrossing New Mexico talking to voters, and it was making a difference. Polls often showed me in the lead, and it was clear my message was resonating with voters.

But then, late in the summer, outside groups started entering the state and making media buys. A lot of media buys. Four prominent conservative groups, including one founded by the Koch brothers, spent nearly three quarters of a million dollars on ads attacking me in the final months of the campaign.

My campaign had prepared for the worst, and we were able to answer some of the attacks with our own ads to refute their lies. But those conservative ads still made a dent in our grassroots campaign’s work and made the election much closer. I consider myself fortunate to have won.

In 2016, Russ Feingold in Wisconsin faced a similar issue. He worked hard to meet with voters. His ideas resonated with Wisconsinites. And the Koch brothers and other conservatives with deep pockets wanted to see him lose. In the end, dark money conservative groups spent more than $7 million attacking Russ. Russ didn’t have the resources to challenge the Kochs’ attacks on his campaign and lost his race, despite leading in every poll.

**That is why I am asking for your support today. Today is primary day, and tomorrow is Day 1 of the general election. I cannot risk being caught unprepared when outside groups start spending against me. We need another 235 contributions in our account by midnight tomorrow. Will you pitch in and help us reach our goal before the deadline?**

**[Your contribution will power my efforts to continue fighting not only for New Mexican values, but for our nation’s.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.2i2/WfDPvTDQTQy735HhnPjibA/h2/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cguUiYJt6jTLP5sZSWOrB2TvV9TTAz7zkAvtihgRFEZa9ocjmNmiqqMVxKilQxA29JKrRZn7bTSEF9RECXhB-2F7RnOywZ1n44QWA5hJyqzvZQPPeGmsYOigqhPeUncuvp2-2BHO8AuRoSM5eOvdGUzFcNo4G77jb6BEVC4iXSLMogwGwlMdDlBzvG0PBnefbV2EAdxUE9XFen6ydYEm21jRAbqQ-3D-3D)**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
_ [Donate $10 now](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.2i2/WfDPvTDQTQy735HhnPjibA/h3/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXqnRAkJXvRo3HepYKxRlKZN-2B3IoCjbT-2BpggTaZ2fPZwfOjk1ngq7P8s1-2F4HoAP0h5Ed4w-2BjwX4xmHKbbY2meN7Cy9V5Uwyv73Qj8E0Pvc-2BINng4UUtIbn7p3LbfC5rDiNvNVWzwmGme8PRD-2FLp8kbzgBp4GCCAj3RHCh84LPDBNvN38nVCkTppTsPqSGPDw5NENE77j2YBdKTdZ4tvX0Xfpi5W8R8MfQl2Kwr42jDp2vfmzyJLTDB3ppV2-2F43O9V-2FCVc-2F0oLSuwApwdfbNbVPgg-3D-3D) clean_body: | | | We know we email a lot, team, but Martin’s story below helps explain why. Tomorrow is Day 1 of the general election, and Begin original message from Martin Heinrich: Friend, I want to tell you the story of two different campaigns. It will only take a moment, but At this time in 2012, I was in the middle of my first campaign for the Senate. I’d been crisscrossing New Mexico talking to voters, and it was making a difference. Polls often showed me in the lead, and it was clear my message was resonating with voters. But then, late in the summer, outside groups started entering the state and making media buys. A lot of media buys. Four prominent conservative groups, including one founded by the Koch brothers, spent nearly three quarters of a million dollars on ads attacking me in the final months of the campaign. My campaign had prepared for the worst, and we were able to answer some of the attacks with our own ads to refute their lies. But those conservative ads still made a dent in our grassroots campaign’s work and made the election much closer. I consider myself fortunate to have won. In 2016, Russ Feingold in Wisconsin faced a similar issue. He worked hard to meet with voters. His ideas resonated with Wisconsinites. And the Koch brothers and other conservatives with deep pockets wanted to see him lose. In the end, dark money conservative groups spent more than $7 million attacking Russ. Russ didn’t have the resources to challenge the Kochs’ attacks on his campaign and lost his race, despite leading in every poll. That is why I am asking for your support today. Today is primary day, and tomorrow is Day 1 of the general election. I cannot risk being caught unprepared when outside groups start spending against me. We need another 235 contributions in our account by midnight tomorrow. Will you pitch in and help us reach our goal before the deadline? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for sticking with me and supporting me. Martin Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Martin Heinrich for US Senate, please .

subject: We are Unified!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ian Todd for Congress
body:
CD6 is unified for 2018!
We came out of the convention strong in CD6!
Donate Now! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=postconvention&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=afb449f43a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_06_05_08_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-afb449f43a-9291445)
Last weekend was the DFL State Convention, and during the exciting balloting process for our gubernatorial candidate, I had the chance to give an impassioned speech about CD6. Folks, don't count CD6 out! We're unified this year, and we're ready to fight.

When I walk out my door to go to events, town halls, or to door knock, I'm walking through a district that's excited about progressive values. I'm consistently knocking on doors of people ready for a new face in Congress, one that will fight against corruption and fight for our right to health care.

CD6 has never been more in reach of DFL representation, but like all Congressional seats, we can't win in a vacuum.

We can't win without support. I'm doing to work necessary to turn CD6 blue, but I need the full force and support behind me from everyone who's committed to bringing progressive values to Washington.

After my speech, I was constantly approached by people who wanted to thank me for running, to tell me how energizing my speech was, and to wish me luck in my campaign. Thank you, but I need more than well wishes. I need volunteer support to reach all the doors, and I need donations to fuel the printing press and get this message out to everyone.

If someone wants to tell you CD6 is a safe Republican seat, take it from someone on the ground every day; There are no safe Republican seats left. Donate today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=postconvention&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=afb449f43a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_06_05_08_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-afb449f43a-9291445) to turn Minnesota blue!

name: Kathy Manning
subject: What keeps you up at night? (survey)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | One of the most compelling questions I've gotten on the campaign trail so far is, "Kathy, what issue keeps you up at night?" It's a tough question because there isn't just one issue that keeps me up thinking -- there are many. Job creation. Health care. Education. How do we bring good-paying jobs back to the district? How do we preserve access to affordable health insurance and bring costs down? How do we fix our schools and better prepare our kids for jobs of today and tomorrow? The challenges families face across North Carolina keep me up at night. I've spent my career bringing people together and solving problems, and I'm ready to step up to help answer these questions and dozens more just like them. My faith and family have instilled in me an obligation to give back. My great-grandparents came to this country with nothing but a determination to build a better life for themselves and their family. This country gave them a world of opportunity to build the American Dream. We must ensure those opportunities exist for today and tomorrow's generation -- and that's why I'm running for Congress. Here is my question to you today: **What issues keep YOU up at night?** [**_Fill out the survey to let me know >>_**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542784f/e3b7d3/5ca9903d/2555d6b3/202846862/VEsH/ "https://manning.bsd.net/e180605") I look forward to seeing your responses. Kathy
---

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Molly Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there
Earlier this week, I was proud to endorse my friend Molly Kelly in her campaign for Governor. Molly understands the challenges and priorities facing our state -- because she's lived them.
As a single mother raising three children, Molly worked her way through Keene State College, waiting tables at a pizza place and delivering newspapers in rural New Hampshire so she could put food on the table.
Before Molly ran for the New Hampshire Senate, I spoke a lot with her about why she should run. What I learned then, and what I grew to learn more about her when we served together, is her dedication to the people of New Hampshire.
[**Molly is the right candidate to lead the Granite State forward, but she needs your support. Can you contribute $3 or more to her campaign for Governor?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a7/2a380d31/efab7fe/f198f4/1554819460/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bWsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYwNV9NV0g0TUtfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4mk?refcode=e20180605_MWH4MK_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
In the New Hampshire Senate, Molly focused on critical issues like expanding job training and workforce development; fighting for public schools; and combating the fentanyl, heroin, and opioid crisis.
Molly has a deep commitment to expanding opportunity for all hard-working Granite Staters. She knows how to bring people together to get results.
New Hampshire has a history of electing strong women to lead our state, and I'm excited to continue that tradition by electing Molly in November.
With Democrats sweeping special elections across New Hampshire over the last year, momentum is on our side. Now, let's elect Molly as the next Governor of New Hampshire!
[**I hope you 'll join me in supporting Molly's campaign by contributing $3 or more today.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a7/2a380d31/efab7fe/f198f4/1554819460/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bWsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYwNV9NV0g0TUtfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4mk?refcode=e20180605_MWH4MK_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
We need a governor who understands the challenges that working families face, and will fight for all of us. Molly Kelly will be that governor.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a7/2a380d31/efab7fe/f198f4/1554819460/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bWsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDYwNV9NV0g0TUtfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4mk?refcode=e20180605_MWH4MK_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0a7/2a380d31/efab7fe/f198f5/1554819460/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
Senator Hassan is asking for contributions of up to $2,700 per election from individuals and $5,000 per election from multicandidate PACs. She is not asking for contributions in excess of the federal limits, or from corporations, labor organizations, and/or other federally prohibited sources.

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: Roby Confident Ahead of Six-Week Runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:

| | For Immediate Release: Tuesday, June 5, 2018
Contact: [Emily Taylor-Johnson](mailto:emily@martharoby.com), 334.717.0461

**Roby Confident Ahead of Six-Week Runoff**
MONTGOMERY, AL -- U.S. Representative Martha Roby (R-AL) tonight released the following statement regarding the runoff election for the 2018 Republican primary:
**"I am grateful for the strong support my campaign has received, and I look forward to continuing to discuss my proven record as a conservative Republican for the next six weeks. We have run this race before.****The people who live and work in Alabama’s Second District rejected the big government, liberal policies that came as a result of the Barack Obama and Nancy Pelosi era when they voted to replace Democrat Bobby Bright with a Republican. I am confident they will do so again.**
**"Our unified Republican government has accomplished a lot over the last year and a half, and I believe I am best positioned to deliver meaningful results for****our military, veterans, farmers, and hardworking Alabamians.****I'm eager to continue my work on behalf of the people I represent, and I humbly ask for their continued support on July 17."**
Martha Roby has served Alabama's Second Congressional District since 2011, when she defeated former Democrat Congressman Bobby Bright.

###

body:
Hey there -
**_The Washington Post_ just reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" - and that we have no room for error in the fight for Senate control.**
**Democrats need to go all-in in Nevada.** But with a new poll showing us neck and neck with GOP extremist Dean Heller, this is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country.
There's no doubt about it: If you're a Democrat who cares about taking back the Senate and protecting Obamacare and the future of the Supreme Court, then we need you with us now. Democrats _cannot_ take back the Senate if we lose here in Nevada, **so we 've _got_ to hit every single one of our fundraising goals, including tonight's. But with just hours until midnight, we're still falling way short of our $15,000 goal.**

According to new internal polling, my primary opponent has lost dramatic ground following our historic victory at last month's GOP convention.

I think you’ll want to check out the latest polls, Friend.

According to **[new internal polling](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFiJCtMmXXiktwZ417DnSWRG9riYoKIdn75KIuI8XIf2UVVqHzHIuePE3RE2ZGnyLcqYAptzjEGUWlZ8ffrAMJb27Y7LyGRG4NJWDailfEnhwavatXkYmCuNcGFtR22znoJohKueekhHmk9e9eE1QgjSsdOkEoPAeuK7HyxaOvX48QFhpcCiG0oYdf38fVaw6iQWG8Ar7sWcjFdINvzAv1GwvWbzsBdjmg-3kj4bUu6EZZyX3-yUq6spiMiKMG3XabixkjfZ9TdXt4f1AnkNsUCpKoyMy34ZuS95vW76EU0xZRRAXfBOlZaxOqvatM04McV7wlO6VWC-mRp6xok6rAOcBrqihGw8dJJiPMVLFEbbYqDHzrZeAyE3Ij52CdqG9Z7arGFlnEZ5SgvRmGi_NBVIbGb0UttOyafs4N0OBsJXk-SsjERdJe2Uejo35aZEDewW7-yNDdZlyhjXBYmT5IeE%3D)** , my primary opponent has lost dramatic ground following our historic victory at last month's GOP convention.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=FRSuo0Qoaynsv0IkRzdc02TTIPwq8z_xwQEtn6ZKpHzkeu4QDbWv6dQVqwqabLki6_81Xtklvb6fq45neKcl3OSpjCYeIoQFp81lTLEGhqG_aMCQHKoNQ7vpKE8bssyB53pvzi_huB2F5axfQxmBsChfyvqh5L9Nsz7bujQCouJJTCfTv0DDl8zS5F50-B1nGAJ1nMozUb2JykVncRIPk3aTVdqm2jkgLDS_ZJWOtlLNhPJ1lClv_IKgF7GGKII3). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFlP2Cbfo6U_VTjZyaVn2WIhddzXZfKSrqVddfCGyXbU717YtIyHLAOcKreW-Y-14gGjOHOOlNnDME9Qba_lHDNSm9RMHyJ5Cv5KjQcXtJsMA_OuzO98kzD8n99P_w1d0E1vfSogdhrkex_KfX8omRabRO19PB6K59r09tcadIBE-OIINxFvhazt7ALaeBKhjHnvKL4DOsmn5pCoF59CBhoTT3pF96vPburkhqtackANQtnJ35pqTi0eL_tPdCoZJZ7XjW4MctwpEBThYP-q1FN3gVxt2pdTZpNx5LCOvb6ThToMNGHEOhLmLcV8LMh_SxrNRRWRJKVXS0biyH0JGBfvcz8jzud5DFhJrPG9oCXNj) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFlP2Cbfo6U_VTjZyaVn2WIgBubMHKCkr_2eMapeizR3n1K_y02rQdOJh3BnXijOCUKBGRwZr37OXdHUABcvJ7lumYMUJhbdZaGsMhKf6Wf2KUO-O6L1He9YCxZRTncrq6lGU94I7KC784kgHS7XoNrKyCx1OpkvkFMorJUETY6ixuUr-bW90ySfjdbKtJuVwAPqKzk4zZjaF3KIFs1a-51XnD3CxYRItObkHEhJg_7HrYTWqYMRTfENpETVJMpyaTEiuT223T3vwKLL2rCjMXRguqGBkhK2fKD3DPCaIACcSD_s2oKiRRwUuhe60yEXhv7MQJs3-wqe8tYzHY0F6xNsGCxnC2Qy_d_fNtKI3sKYs) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFruHdV3-YCPfc6PMTgGljxB71EcDG8n4K4qVFDG7QX7D3rOFPYEEHrGolNoQyyGUZQuCicgNjqdLkV9lB2uPqfvzX8Q2PrEygeexCH7qT0SIJ9VV7qYdBgcMtPtknRiI3AV_volvaEVMI-5VGv_vzYQZ1T_TdP3KQr5FB9X6GsWqKC-8ZsRSp84wVnBnEw_oITfThqHEga25K8oToyWL-PocTqC3qNL-_9GTqQqJ34ZONBtljXg3CdTv4jho5c-nqw%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFvwgWoxdde8vMyDSHcn2fVmnrU1L3PD20MOQbzH-CdBEzi3zNcw3Ux5qHntm-8gTSjUqCVRias1hha9qNvu8ncWz-btVKzer7jvsdNY1s9lnlol_HvXquryPQY7MvGKhG1WrH_LAq_ZZdy79zXATY9QZPvfuBNb_hooA-U3yyHHQavg9U8HKq-RFydrVCUxBaM9EUIAu8Wzv_5stgG5kMfN0Ss7I2EpZ7XfWQocD-IWF9TvuQBi2zAaYrQ-qLKW6og%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFvI-dRRAzbb1P9wUcMiZzfjP-njQyiZn_dwrFAQxPLaKadjU93zJ0XIAqxJsegtZHaZYMMe_C-bPKBf2tHvazqYRKXQrgGpjM8T_wr7IG4pVsjhech5Fx3hjrq33CZdbcvUnw5lRHUA7wx9vgE9uWXkHx4xFRlr5vNyRTo9X1-Ny79tYbDhBclNXfigqXMdbxoyBNhMa3kkaJvM1S8ea1iEWp1alkbltH8ZvL0qMj_AwrA1KWXkYpKQTyOkXM2tlrA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=gjDi8YaM0wc2OzofUPFRFlP2Cbfo6U_VTjZyaVn2WIjJdV2GrpVIuyglnJLslYud3BWCXe2UA36lrfIpJ7XoAZHgYH1Y-P5WeMJLNSg2CUznZjW6-b6W9M6WT_BvttqrkHczlM_TKDPaiNzloiluuSK33JzgvEIPrHRHiKz80poUawvWHkxqcpXWIskjQF5SgL1G03b1OaxnzMZZ0lSNUa5bFBlFZ9XOJbjdV-GZsSPC5RVlRfPgBYemW0MekgKLS7fcnmAO4r8J4k2r71o1DyTR4PQtlI0Df7V4nfwkf8Alsw7GitEuwabej6sompY06Y20D_d5Yx-SfvtwS4tI7kS4LLc1DaKe9ntxg4TfyWHqflu8EQIQue13IhuGZlbSnLnmIjlIc8GpNqKBsto2mA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=FRSuo0Qoaynsv0IkRzdc02TTIPwq8z_xwQEtn6ZKpHzkeu4QDbWv6dQVqwqabLki6_81Xtklvb6fq45neKcl3OSpjCYeIoQFp81lTLEGhqG_aMCQHKoNQ7vpKE8bssyB53pvzi_huB2F5axfQxmBsChfyvqh5L9Nsz7bujQCouJJTCfTv0DDl8zS5F50-B1nGAJ1nMozUb2JykVncRIPk3aTVdqm2jkgLDS_ZJWOtlLNhPJ1lClv_IKgF7GGKII3) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=3c4df5a5f9ce45aaaca42cbeb08b45f2&_e=FRSuo0Qoaynsv0IkRzdc02TTIPwq8z_xwQEtn6ZKpHzkeu4QDbWv6dQVqwqabLki6_81Xtklvb6fq45neKcl3OSpjCYeIoQFp81lTLEGhqG_aMCQHKoNQ7vpKE8bssyB53pvzi_huB2F5axfQxmBsChfyvqh5L9Nsz7bujQCouJJTCfTv0DDl8zS5F50-B1nGAJ1nMozUb2JykVncRIPk3aTVdqm2jkgLDS_ZJWOtlLNhPJ1lClv_IKgF7GGKII3) to unsubscribe. clean_body: According to new internal polling, my primary opponent has lost dramatic ground following our historic victory at last month's GOP convention. I think you’ll want to check out the latest polls, Friend. According to , my primary opponent has lost dramatic ground following our historic victory at last month's GOP convention. But here is the most exciting part, among voters who know both him and me, our team has an incredible 16-point lead. These latest numbers prove what we already knew: momentum is with US. But we must keep pushing towards our goal. There are still too many voters who don't know who I am. That has to change. Together, we will win. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Troy
subject: Go vote!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U
body:
This is it. Polls across Montana are open! Months of criss-crossing the state, hearing directly from you and listening to what you expect out of your leaders in Washington, has led to this moment. Make sure you head to the polls and cast your vote today! Polls are open until 8PM.
| | | | [ ](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-r/)
---
Peter,
This is it. Polls across Montana are open!
Months of criss-crossing the state, hearing directly from you and listening to what you expect out of your leaders in Washington, has led to this moment.
**Make sure you head to the polls and cast your vote today! Polls are open until 8PM**
If you are unsure, you can find your polling location by [clicking here.](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-y/)
[](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-j/)
Montana deserves better than being represented by Jon Tester, who has proven time and time again he’d rather stand with Chuck Schumer than with Montanans.
Jon Tester will claim to support President Trump, yet votes against him time and time again.
He claims to be against illegal immigration, yet took the side of illegal immigrants when he voted to shut down the government -- twice.
And Jon Tester has been such a roadblock that even President Trump is calling for Montanans to vote him out this November.
But the only way we can get him out of Washington is if you vote for me, Troy Downing for U.S. Senate.
**Polls are open across Montana until 8PM. Grab your friends and head out to cast your vote to send a conservative businessman and combat veteran to the Senate.**
Called to Serve,
Troy Downing
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate
P.S - Once you have voted, make sure to share our election day graphics on [Facebook](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-t/) and [Twitter](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-i/) with your friends!
[](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-d/)
_**To download on a computer:** Click the image to open in a new window, right-click the image, and select ‘Save Image As’. Save and upload to Facebook or Twitter.
_**To download on a mobile device:** Click the image and select ‘Save Image As’. Save and upload to Facebook or Twitter.
[DONATE](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-k/)
| [](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-u/) [](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-o/)[](https://troydowningforussenate.cmail19.com/t/d-l-bwiily-yhdyitiujj-b/)

---
PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR U.S. SENATE

name: BREAKING@bobcasey.com
subject: What President Trump just said (more inside)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
**He's at it _AGAIN_

President Trump just praised Congressman Lou Barletta from the _White House lawn_**

We need to fight back
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6687/51dbcc2a/792fb8d/3a2d889/388817744/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNV9mcjJfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180605_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

President Trump has made it clear where he stands in this race, team, and we need to take his involvement seriously.

Just this afternoon, while standing on the White House lawn, President Trump once again praised the GOP nominee to challenge Bob Casey this year. It's not the first time he's gotten involved: he previously recorded an expensive robocall for Barletta and appeared on stage with him at rallies, and he has used his infamous Twitter account to attack Bob multiple times.

**This. Will. Keep. Happening.**

President Trump is proud of his win in Pennsylvania in 2016, where Barletta was one of his earliest and strongest supporters. He will do whatever it takes to flip this Senate seat in order to protect his reputation in PA and the GOP's Senate majority. **We need to stop him.**

Bob may not have the power of the presidency (and all of the attention and outside spending that comes with it), but he does have supporters like you, talking to your neighbors and giving what you can, when you can.

**If we're going to beat Congressman Barletta and his powerful friends, we need to work together. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can before midnight to show Barletta and Trump where Pennsylvania stands?**

[**_secure.bobcasey.com/donate_**](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6687/51dbcc2a/792fb8d/3a2d889/388817744/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNV9mcjJfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180605_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Thanks,

Team Casey

| Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6687/51dbcc2a/792fb8d/3a2d889/388817744/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNV9mcjJfbmRfcmVtIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180605_fr2_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6687/51dbcc2a/792fb8d/3a2d88a/388817744/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia PA 19102 United States

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: Did you see what VP Biden announced?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
But Vice President Biden knows as well as we do that Joe's race is going to be tough -- and the stakes couldn't be higher. Millions of Americans' access to affordable health care depends on what happe |
---

| | Incredible news, Peter -- Vice President Joe Biden endorsed Joe's re-election campaign! | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21a2/7377f838/3c2a9ffe/51f90411/3789987991/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-vpbiden?refcode=20180605.2nd&amount=10")
---
Joe couldn't be prouder to get an endorsement from such a respected and vocal champion for the middle class, affordable health care, and ending violence against women.

But Vice President Biden knows as well as we do that Joe's race is going to be tough -- and the stakes couldn't be higher. Millions of Americans' access to affordable health care depends on what happens here in November. That's why Indiana's Senate race is expected to be one of the most expensive and challenging in the nation.

We're setting a **$10,000 one-day goal** to show VP Biden that we're committed to winning this race and fighting for the issues he and Joe have championed together.

**Will you chip in to stand with VP Biden and help us build a campaign that reaches every single Indiana voter?**
